title: Flat Crops
description: [1.21.10-11] Replaces most crops with flat, 1 pixel tall smooth colors. Made to be easy on the eyes in Hypixel Skyblock farming.
body:
Flat Crops is a 1.21 implementation of the [original texture pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flat-crops) made by **[sageuk](https://modrinth.com/user/sageuk)**.

Flat Crops removes the ugly default crops that you'll be staring at for thousands of hours and replaces them with clean, flat, 1 pixel tall smooth tiles that are easier on the eyes. Also removes block breaking particles for all crops.

![With and without texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b68a73ceb81ee0371499d14dc981ecfdd6503ef.png)

This pack affects the following crops:

- All 4 base crops [potato, wheat, wart, carrot]
- All mushrooms [red, brown]
- Cocoa
- Sunflower
- Wild Rose

Sunflowers and Wild Roses are a smaller footprint to avoid z fighting bewteen models and since plants in Minecraft are offset on the block they rest on.

If you want, you can disable this offset by using the mod [NoTextureRotations](https://modrinth.com/mod/notexturerotations).

_Published with permission from **sageuk**_
